evidence_labels: Bulbapedia release info identifies a Cracked Ice Holofoil version in the Plasma Claw Theme Deck.
PriceCharting tracks Druddigon [Cracked Ice Holo] #94 as a separate product.
PriceCharting base Druddigon #94 product includes non-holo/regular-sale context.
blockers.reason_not_promoted: Evidence distinguishes cracked ice holo from the base card; this audit does not collapse cracked_ice into holo.
blockers.next_action: Classify as finish-label conflict unless an exact plain holo source is found.

evidence_labels: PokeScope exact card page identifies Emerald #107/106 Farfetch'd as Rare Secret with Market Price (TCG holofoil).
blockers.reason_not_promoted: Available exact source context does not support normal finish.
blockers.next_action: Classify as possible unsupported normal unless an exact normal-source record is found.

evidence_labels: Bulbapedia release info identifies the Pokémon League Yellow A Alternate card as English card no. 187a/214.
PkmnCards identifies Net Ball Lost Thunder #187a/214 as Alternate.
Magic Stronghold product page identifies Net Ball (Pokemon League) #187a/214 Reverse Holofoil.
blockers.reason_not_promoted: Exact league/stamped evidence points to 187a/214, not exact card number 187/214.
blockers.next_action: Resolve numbering/alias identity before any promotion.

evidence_labels: PokeScope exact card page lists Reverse Holofoil and Holofoil variants for 151 #146/165 Moltres.
blockers.reason_not_promoted: Available exact source does not list normal finish.
blockers.next_action: Classify as possible unsupported normal unless exact normal evidence is found.

Guardian TCG card page describes Professor's Research #62/73 as Holo Rare / Reverse Holofoil context.
